notes: The direct-order creation slice now exercises the richer locally supported orderCreate surface: options, transactions, tax lines, a fixed discount code, shipping/address/custom-attribute fields, currency/presentment money, one variant-backed line item with inventory bypass, and immediate downstream `order(id:)` visibility. The comparison targets assert the full selected order objects so newly selected order fields are covered automatically; expected differences are limited to Shopify-generated identifiers and order names.

expectedDifferences.reason: Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different order ids for the staged order.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy allocate independent merchant-facing order names.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy necessarily allocate different line item ids for the staged order.
